label: 1551 CE
era_summary: Year 1551 (MDLI) was a common year starting on Thursday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1551: Algiers-Spain,Italy (Tunis), 1534-1563. Maddison records GDP/capita 2340 (ITA, 1551) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1551: Algiers-Spain,Italy (Tunis), 1534-1563; Spain-Chile, 1540-61; Spain, Emperor-France, Saxony, 1551-55. Maddison records GDP/capita 1446 (ESP, 1551) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
